  • Mar 17, 2026 · David Weller

    Staff AI Skills Training in Higher Education: What Actually Works in 2026

    A practical look at what effective staff AI training in higher education needs to include: role-specific support, anxiety-aware design, and measurable outcomes.

    • Mar 12, 2026 · Katie Steen

      Don’t Lose Your Voice to AI

      A personal reflection on where AI can help with writing, where it can reduce anxiety, and why keeping a human voice still matters.

      • Feb 20, 2026 · Katie Steen

        Presenting at AI South-West in Taunton

        Reflections from AI South West Live in Taunton, where the biggest theme was clear: successful AI adoption starts with people, not tools.

        • Dec 5, 2025 · Katie Steen

          Removing the Stranger from the Room

          Why anxiety around AI is often a sign of unfamiliarity, and why universities need space for guidance, training, and honest conversations.

          • Nov 28, 2025 · Katie Steen

            What Do We Gain? AI’s Value to the Workforce

            A reflection on AI productivity gains, workforce value, and why universities should ask who benefits when technology frees up time.

            • Nov 21, 2025 · Katie Steen

              Empowering Universities Through AI Training

              Why meaningful AI adoption in universities depends on empowering staff and leaders with the knowledge, confidence, and involvement to shape decisions.
